description: Add homepage URL to the Linear plugin so the side panel 'open tab' feature can open linear.app when no matching tab exists.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/linear && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add homepage to Linear plugin
userStories.description: Add homepage: 'https://linear.app' to both the Linear plugin class and package.json opentabs field.
acceptanceCriteria: LinearPlugin class has readonly homepage = 'https://linear.app' after urlPatterns
userStories.notes:
Files:
- plugins/linear/src/index.ts (add homepage property to LinearPlugin class)
- plugins/linear/package.json (add homepage to opentabs field)

Context:
The LinearPlugin class currently has:
```typescript
class LinearPlugin extends OpenTabsPlugin {
  readonly name = 'linear';
  readonly description = 'OpenTabs plugin for Linear';
  override readonly displayName = 'Linear';
  readonly urlPatterns = ['*://linear.app/*'];
  readonly tools: ToolDefinition[] = [
```

Changes:
1. In src/index.ts, add after `readonly urlPatterns = ['*://linear.app/*'];`:
```typescript
  readonly homepage = 'https://linear.app';
```

2. In package.json opentabs field, add after urlPatterns:
```json
"homepage": "https://linear.app"
```

Constraints:
- Do NOT change urlPatterns.
- Do NOT add excludePatterns.
